# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

| Version | Supported          |
| ------- | ------------------ |
| 0.1.x   | :white_check_mark: |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

Please report security issues privately by emailing the maintainer listed in
`pyproject.toml` (authors section), or via GitHub Security Advisories on the
repository.

Do not open public issues for undisclosed security vulnerabilities.

We aim to acknowledge reports within a few business days and will coordinate
disclosure and fixes as appropriate.
